# puubra

> puubra is a premium lingerie and loungewear brand. We design comfortable, elegant pieces — including our signature wireless Jelly Bra — that help women feel confident every day.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand introduction, featured collections, and best sellers.
- [Bras Collection](/collections/bras): Shop our full bra collection including wireless and Jelly Bra styles.
- [Tops Collection](/collections/tops): Coming soon.
- [Pantyhose Collection](/collections/pantyhose): Coming soon.
- [Pajama Sets Collection](/collections/pajamas): Coming soon.
- [Sale](/sale): Current promotions and discounted lingerie.
- [Jelly Bra Pre-Order](/jelly-bra): Pre-order our signature wireless Jelly Bra.
- [Journal](/blog): Style tips, care guides, and stories from puubra.
- [About](/about): Who we are and what we stand for.
- [Our Story](/our-story): The story behind puubra.
- [Sustainability](/sustainability): Our commitment to responsible production.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles at puubra.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with our customer care team.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about orders, shipping, returns, and care.
- [Size Guide](/size-guide): How to find your perfect size.
- [Shipping](/shipping): Shipping options, times, and rates.
- [Returns](/returns): Return and exchange policy.

- Contact: hello@puubra.com
